sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81594" key="peri/krotos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περί-κροτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n81594.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rattling round</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κύμβαλα</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:9:117" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.117</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:10:223" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.223</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
